ops.text: capt-hook's CodexAskDetached guard misfires on any literal bare `&` in a codex-ask heredoc body (e.g. Go snippet `&Engine{}`): it scans raw text after the command span for an unescaped `&` and flags it as backgrounding. A lane had to rephrase its task text ("a pointer to a zero-value Engine") to get the dispatch through. The check should parse only the command line, not heredoc payload text.
